data.title: Russia sees no reason to expand crypto mining ban
data.description:
Russia has no plans to impose further restrictions on cryptocurrency mining as it’s not currently facing power shortages, a government official announced. The vast, energy-rich country, which is a major mining destination, has limited or completely banned the minting of digital coins in a number of regions experiencing electricity deficits. Russian government halts mining ban […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-sees-no-reason-to-expand-crypto-mining-ban/

data.title: CEO Admits $200M Bitcoin Ponzi Scheme, Spent Millions on Cars and Mansions
data.description:
Ramil Ventura Palafox, CEO of Praetorian Group International (PGI), ran a $200M Bitcoin Ponzi scheme that defrauded over 90,000 investors. He misled clients with fake trading returns, manipulated an online portal to show profits, and spent millions on luxury cars, homes, and personal expenses. Palafox has pleaded guilty to wire fraud and money laundering. The post CEO Admits $200M Bitcoin Ponzi Scheme, Spent Millions on Cars and Mansions first appeared on The Shib Daily
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/09/19/ceo-admits-200m-bitcoin-ponzi-scheme-spent-millions-on-cars-and-mansions/

data.title: White House Faces Heat on CFTC Nominee After Winklevoss Criticism
data.description:
The White House is exploring new candidates for CFTC chair after Brian Quintenz’s nomination stalled, amid political pushback and scrutiny linked to Gemini co-founders, the Winklevoss twins. Potential replacements include officials with crypto regulatory experience, as the selection could shape U. S. oversight of digital assets
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/09/19/white-house-faces-heat-on-cftc-nominee-after-winklevoss-criticism/

data.title: Aster's revenue exceeded $442,000 yesterday, setting a record for its highest single-day revenue to date.
data.description: DeFiLlama data shows that the decentralized exchange Aster Protocol's revenue reached $442,115 on September 18th, setting a record for its highest single-day revenue to date. Furthermore, according to platform data from the first day after Aster launched the ASTER TGE on the X platform, the platform's trading volume reached $345 million within 24 hours; 330,000 new wallets joined; the platform's TVL increased from $660 million to $1.005 billion; and the platform's trading volume approached $1.5 billion.

data.title: PayPal's USD Stablecoin PYUSD Launches on Aptos
data.description: PayPal's USD stablecoin, PYUSD, has been expanded to Aptos via LayerZero and Stargate Hydra, launching as PYUSD 0. Aptos is the only Move public chain to support PYUSD 0. Aptos' stablecoin has already surpassed $1.2 billion in value and supports native USDC, USDT, and USDDe, three major global stablecoins. Leveraging LayerZero's cross-chain infrastructure and Stargate interfaces, PYUSD 0 remains fully composable and interoperable on Aptos. This provides the Aptos ecosystem with a new entry point for stable USD. Aptos's inclusion further promotes the adoption of the digital dollar within Web 3 financial infrastructure.
